description: CompositionWhite kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline with lace, multi-coloured yoke with embroidery and mirror work, buttoned chest placket, long sleeves with embroidery and mirror work on the cuffs, zigzag hem with lace detailing, embroidery and mirror work and a vented hem FitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe neckline, placket and cuffs on this kurta from biba are decorated with beautiful and subtly stylish embroidery and mirror work. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
